title: Configuration
description: Workspace defaults, branding, and meeting policies.

coming-soon.title: Configuration is on the way
coming-soon.description: Workspace defaults, branding, and meeting policies will live here soon.

form.title: Workspace defaults
form.subtitle: Defaults applied to new meetings across the workspace.
form.default-title-help: Used when a meeting is created without a name.
form.title-too-long: Title must be 120 characters or fewer.
form.allow-guests-help: Let people without an account join meetings via a link.
form.max-duration-help: Leave empty for no limit. Between 5 and 1440 minutes.
form.duration-range: Enter a number between 5 and 1440, or leave empty.
